name: Green and Red Tomato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick the green tomatoes just before they begin to ripen red.
2. Cube the green and red tomatoes. Cut the onion into thin slices and separate into rings.
3. Combine the tomatoes and onions in a salad bowl with the chopped basil.
4. Combine the dressing ingredients, mixing well.
5. Add the dressing to the salad and toss.
6. Let set about 30 minutes to blend flavors.
7. Delicious with BBQ!
Yield: 4 to 6 servings.
